popularStory.headline: Alexander II
popularStory.description:
(Mediaeval Gaelic: Alaxandair mac Uilliam; Modern Gaelic: Alasdair mac Uilleim) (24 August 1198 – 6 July 1249) was King of Scots from 1214 to his death.

He was born at Haddington, East Lothian, the o …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander II, King of Scots於1198年8月24日出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾哈丁頓時，他的父親William 'The Lion' King of Scotland56歲，母親Ermengarde de Beaumont Queen of Scotland28歲。他於1239年5月15日與Queen Marie de Coucy在蘇格蘭洛包爾洛包結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1249年7月8日在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特音納 賀布利德斯享年50歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭斯可迪夏 波德斯梅露絲梅露絲 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander II, King of Scots于1198年8月24日出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾哈丁頓时，他的父亲William 'The Lion' King of Scotland56岁，母亲Ermengarde de Beaumont Queen of Scotland28岁。他于1239年5月15日与Queen Marie de Coucy在苏格兰洛包爾洛包结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1249年7月8日在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特音納 賀布利德斯享年50岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰斯可迪夏 波德斯梅露絲梅露絲 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander II, King of Scots was born on 24 August 1198, in Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, his father, William 'The Lion' King of Scotland, was 56 and his mother, Ermengarde de Beaumont Queen of Scotland, was 28. He married Queen Marie de Coucy on 15 May 1239, in Roxburgh, Roxburghshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 8 July 1249, in Inner Hebrides, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 50, and was buried in Melrose Abbey, Melrose, Scottish Borders, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander II, King of Scots est né le 24 août 1198, à Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, William 'The Lion' King of Scotland, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Ermengarde de Beaumont Queen of Scotland, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Queen Marie de Coucy le 15 mai 1239, à Roxburgh, Roxburghshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 8 juillet 1249, à Inner Hebrides, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Melrose Abbey, Melrose, Scottish Borders, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander II, King of Scots am 24. August 1198 in Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater William 'The Lion' King of Scotland 56 und seine Mutter Ermengarde de Beaumont Queen of Scotland 28. Er hat am 15. Mai 1239 in Roxburgh, Roxburghshire, Scotland Queen Marie de Coucy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 8. Juli 1249 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Inner Hebrides, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Melrose Abbey, Melrose, Scottish Borders, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander II, King of Scots è nato il il 24 agosto 1198 nel Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, il suo padre, William 'The Lion' King of Scotland, aveva 56 anni e il suo madre, Ermengarde de Beaumont Queen of Scotland, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Queen Marie de Coucy il 15 maggio 1239, nel Roxburgh, Roxburghshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 8 luglio 1249, nel Inner Hebrides, Argyll and Bute, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Melrose Abbey, Melrose, Scottish Borders, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander II, King of Scotsが1198年8月24日にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアハッドイントンで生まれた時，父William 'The Lion' King of Scotlandは56歳，母Ermengarde de Beaumont Queen of Scotlandは28歳であった。1239年5月15日にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアロクスブルグでQueen Marie de Coucyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1249年7月8日にイギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトイナー ヘブリズで50歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドスコッティッシュ ボルダースメルローゼメルローゼ アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander II, King of Scots(이)가 1198년 8월 24일 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 하딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William 'The Lion' King of Scotland(은)는 56세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermengarde de Beaumont Queen of Scotland(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1239년 5월 15일 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 록스버그에서 Queen Marie de Coucy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1249년 7월 8일 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 이너 브라이데스에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 스콧이시 볼더스 멜로즈 멜로즈 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander II, King of Scots nasceu em 24 de agosto de 1198, em Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, William 'The Lion' King of Scotland, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Ermengarde de Beaumont Queen of Scotland, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Queen Marie de Coucy em 15 de maio de 1239, em Roxburgh, Roxburghshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 8 de julho de 1249, em Inner Hebrides, Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Melrose Abbey, Melrose, Scottish Borders, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Isle of Kerrera, Inner Hebrides, Bay of: иннир хебридесь, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.Scone Priory, Old Scone, Perthshire, Sco: скоун приори, олд скоун, пиртшир, Шотландия

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander II, King of Scots родился 24 августа 1198 г. в местности хаддингтон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени William 'The Lion' King of Scotland было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermengarde de Beaumont Queen of Scotland, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Queen Marie de Coucy 15 мая 1239 г. в местности роксбург, роксбургшир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 8 июля 1249 г. в местности иннир хебридесь, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности мелрос эбби, мелрос, скоттиш бордирс, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander II, King of Scots nació el 24 de agosto de 1198, en Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, su papá, William 'The Lion' King of Scotland, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Ermengarde de Beaumont Queen of Scotland, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Queen Marie de Coucy el 15 de mayo de 1239, en Roxburgh, Roxburghshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 8 de julio de 1249, en Inner Hebrides, Argyll and Bute, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Melrose Abbey, Melrose, Scottish Borders, Escocia, Reino Unido.
